title: PROJECT_PROFILE
description: Consumer project configuration for the Trellis bootstrap. Drives path registry generation, security-guidance rule, memory boundary, and observability output paths. The bootstrap script validates this file against the schema before rendering any artifact.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema version. Bump deliberately when adding required fields.

project_name.description: Project identifier used in rendered templates. No spaces or shell metacharacters.

critical_paths.description: Globs that become groups.heavy_lane in the rendered path registry.

deployment_specific_paths.description: Optional extra heavy_lane globs specific to the deployment shape.

claude_system_paths.description: Globs that become groups.claude_system in the rendered path registry.

security_sensitive_paths.description: Globs that drive the rendered security-guidance rule's frontmatter paths.

forbidden_assumptions.description: Runtime behaviors the dev system must not silently authorize. Rendered into the security-guidance rule body.

local_memory_limit_bytes.description: C0.1 ceiling on the local MEMORY.md index size.

memory_boundary_doc.description: When true, render docs/MEMSTORE_HANDOFF.md from the template.

api_memstores_enabled.description: When false (default), the rendered MEMSTORE_HANDOFF.md cloud-memstore section is a stub. When true, the consumer must declare the memstores either by inlining IDs (dev_memstore_id + agent_memstore_id) OR by pointing at a canonical doc that already contains them (memstore_reference). Pointer-only mode is the safer posture for consumers who do not want IDs duplicated into PROJECT_PROFILE.yaml.

dev_memstore_id.description: Consumer-supplied Anthropic memstore ID for dev / cross-session memory. Empty string when api_memstores_enabled is false OR when memstore_reference is used instead.

agent_memstore_id.description: Consumer-supplied Anthropic memstore ID for autonomous-agent learning. Empty string when api_memstores_enabled is false OR when memstore_reference is used instead.

memstore_reference.description: Pointer-only alternative to inlined dev_memstore_id + agent_memstore_id. When api_memstores_enabled is true and the consumer prefers not to duplicate the IDs into PROJECT_PROFILE.yaml, set this to a repo-relative path of the doc that already documents them canonically (e.g. ``docs/MEMSTORE_HANDOFF.md``). The dev-system renderer never reads the pointed-at file at render time — this is a documentation reference, not an indirection that fetches IDs.

review_mode.description: Review automation mode. C0.4 prohibits any other value — auto-fix and auto-merge are operator-only.

operator_reports.description: Where the session/cost report writes; must be a gitignored relative path.

home_session_path.description: Local Claude Code session jsonl directory; default for the session-report script.
